title: The Ink Arena
description: Fight through waves of enemies in the ink arena with a boss at the end!
body:
![Showcase of the structure and logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b082b7109d917d1679feb75688ca837f5f38ddb.png)

[REQUIRES GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

![Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36c41bc46ba10fe1be72e754bd4ee4ff3d0d663f.png)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3099bf76ca459761d2235e0200bbe8649bf3a60d.png)

### This mod is NOT recommended on large public servers due to the way the
### Ink Arena event works, this is because only one event can be active at a time.
### It's perfectly fine for servers with friends though!

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3099bf76ca459761d2235e0200bbe8649bf3a60d.png)
### This mod adds two new structures with several items and mobs.
There are eight new enemies, one of which is a boss. Here are a couple of them:

**Splotch**
- a basic enemy that does minimal damage.

![Splotch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6131a5f98e74ef3bd8b877f8042438bd10d9ca2.png)

**Morphink**
- shoots dangerous projectiles; kill it before it transforms into a stronger enemy.

![Morphink](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69bd9b5d6c0925c5fcddd2596ff817317985e605.png)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3099bf76ca459761d2235e0200bbe8649bf3a60d.png)

**List of all items blocks and mobs.**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
**-------- Items and blocks--------**
 
  ![Items and blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82e1ceaa61b7892d7ca81167f036916a1b54556e.png)
  
- Dried ink clump
- Ink waste
- Paper airplane
- Trapped soul
- Ink power scroll
- Soul power scroll
- Soul Slicer
- Inkstained Grimoire
- Bone ladder
- Ink fluid
- Dried Ink block
- Soul lamp
- Soul core

**-------- All the mobs excluding the boss --------**

![all the mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4881057d33b43cf49d79ed883dc7f62ed691361d.png)

From left to right:

- Splotch
- Soul Tendril
- Ink Brute
- Soul Specter
- Morphink
- Ink Worm
- Ink Titan
</details>



**Defeating the boss give you a soul core; use it to craft one of the new weapons!**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**------------ Soul Slicer ------------**

![Soul Slicer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e17c887e3a20120bc8b5c7c6f14f84dd14a0e53f.png)

Lmb: shoot a piercing slash
can only activate if there are no nearby mobs.

**-------- Inkstained Grimoire --------**

![Inkstained Grimoire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fa0344528269ad007af0911cf509c69aa458221.png)

- Hold Rmb: charge an attack to throw all nearby mobs into the air.
- Lmb: cast an ink spell.

**-------- Soul Brush --------**

![Soul Brush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cca17f07f6a4dd28278d29be6c341f55db80ae7.png)

- Rmb: paint a soul rune on the ground; when a mob walks on it, it breaks and applies the marked effect.

- Lmb: paint an ink rune on the ground; if a mob thats marked walks on it, it breaks and explodes nearby marked mobs.

</details>

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3099bf76ca459761d2235e0200bbe8649bf3a60d.png)

Try the mod for yourself to see it all!
